# doit_platforms (Data Source)

Metadata about supported cloud providers.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all available cloud platforms
data "doit_platforms" "all" {}

# Output platform names
output "platform_names" {
  value = [for p in data.doit_platforms.all.platforms : p.display_name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `timeouts` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `platforms` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--platforms))

<a id="nestedatt--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `read` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).


<a id="nestedatt--platforms"></a>
### Nested Schema for `platforms`

Read-Only:

- `display_name` (String)
- `id` (String)
